features: Hair thickening shampoo: for natural hair with progressed thinning for thicker, fuller hair and reduced breakage; with salicylic acid and peppermint oil
Scalp treatment: gentle cleanser and nourishment for hair and scalp to prevent against follicle-clogging sebum; with antioxidants and botanicals
Biotin hair growth: formulated with niacinamide, biotin and caffeine; nourishes the hair root, stimulates follicles and strengthens hair
How to use: apply to wet hair, gently massaging into the scalp and hair, then rinse; follow with conditioner and scalp treatment
Nioxin routine: for best results, use Nioxin System Kit 2 daily and preferred Nioxin hair styling products; add to your self care regimen or give an optimal beauty gift

specifications_table.Benefits: Nourishes the scalp: infused with nourishing botanicals, antioxidants, and UV protecting ingredients, this kit's Scalp + Hair Thickening Treatment can nourish and revitalise the scalp, improving its overall health and condition., Reduces hair thinning: by strengthening hair resilience, Nioxin System Kit 2 helps minimise hair breakage, promoting the appearance of fuller, thicker hair., Scalp treatment for reduced thinning - hair thickening products for women & men with visible results in 30 days., Supports scalp health: the advanced formula of Nioxin System Kit 2 gently cleanses the scalp, removing impurities and excess sebum that can clog hair follicles, creating a healthier environment for the scalp., Thickens the hair: Nioxin System Kit 2 is clinically designed to add thickness and fullness to natural hair with progressed thinning, with visible results in just 30 days.

product_details_tab_data.Ingredients: Aqua/Water/Eau, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Cocamide MEA, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, Sodium Chloride, Salicylic Acid, Mentha Arvensis Leaf Oil, Mentha Piperita (Peppermint) Oil, Tetrasodium EDTA, Methylparaben, Propylene Glycol, Glycerin, Sodium Hydroxide, Limonene, Camellia Sinensis Leaf Extract, Cystine Bis-PG-Propyl Silanetriol, Niacinamide, Panthenol, Biotin, Lecithin, Tocopheryl Acetate, Urtica Dioica (Nettle) Leaf Extract, Humulus Lupulus (Hops) Flower Extract, Citrus Paradisi (Grapefruit) Peel Extract, Yellow 5 (CI 19140), Vaccinium Myrtillus Leaf Extract, Acer Saccharum (Sugar Maple) Extract, Saccharum Officinarum/Sugar Cane Extract/Extrait de canne à sucre, Citrus Limon (Lemon) Peel Extract, Faex Extract/Yeast Extract/Extrait de levure, Propylparaben, Blue 1 (CI 42090), Phenoxyethanol, Citrus Aurantium Dulcis (Orange) Fruit Extract, Red 33 (CI 17200), Potassium Sorbate, Maltodextrin, Sodium Citrate, Ethylparaben, Butylparaben, Sodium Xylenesulfonate.
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: CAUTION: Do not get into the eyes. Keep out of reach of children. For any questions or concerns about side effects, always consult a medical professional.
